description: Catalog of structured AI-readable resources on nefko.xyz. Fetch json_url payloads for full records.

resources.summary: Kyle Becker is a UX strategist, researcher, and product designer tht works as a freelance consultant with companies. Most of his work as a freelancer has been with small, early stage startups contracting directly, or subcontracting through design firms. In the past, he has worked with frog design, Yoma Bank, J.P. Morgan Onyx, and Crypto Research and Design Lab (CRADL). He has conducted user research in the US, El Salvador, Nigeria, Rwanda, Kenya, Indonesia, and Myanmar. In the past few years, much of his work has centered around AI, blockchain experiences, and emerging market finance.

resources.summary: Kyle Becker argues that crypto's hardest design problems are less about wallet usability and more about demand, market structure, founder-market fit, and complex multi-party systems where blockchain can function as distributed accounting infrastructure.
resources.title: Crypto's Real Design Problem Is Not Usability
